---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new module or improvement
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary
Short description of the feature.

## Motivation
What problem does it solve? Why is it useful?

## Proposed implementation
If you have ideas on how to build it, describe them here.

## Data sources
Which APIs or public sources would power this feature?
Are they free? Do they require registration?
